mapper.sql: feedback_id, company_id, user_id, subject, content, status, resolved_at, resolved_by, resolution_note, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM feedbacks ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feedbacks ( feedback_id, company_id, user_id, subject, content, status, resolved_at, resolved_by, resolution_note, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{feedbackId}, #{companyId}, #{userId}, #{subject}, #{content}, #{status}, #{resolvedAt}, #{resolvedBy}, #{resolutionNote}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE feedbacks SET company_id = #{companyId}, user_id = #{userId}, subject = #{subject}, content = #{content}, status = #{status}, resolved_at = #{resolvedAt}, resolved_by = #{resolvedBy}, resolution_note = #{resolutionNote}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE feedback_id = #{feedbackId}
mapper.select:
SELECT f.feedback_id AS feedbackId, f.company_id AS companyId, c.name AS companyName,
f.user_id AS userId, u.full_name AS userName, u.email AS userEmail,
f.subject AS subject, f.content AS content, f.status AS status,
f.resolved_at AS resolvedAt, f.resolved_by AS resolvedBy, ru.full_name AS resolvedByName, f.resolution_note AS resolutionNote,
f.created_at AS createdAt, f.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM feedbacks f LEFT JOIN companies c ON c.company_id = f.company_id LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id = f.user_id LEFT JOIN users ru ON ru.user_id = f.resolved_by WHERE f.company_id = #{companyId} AND f.user_id = #{userId}
AND UPPER(f.status) = UPPER(#{status})
AND ( f.subject ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR f.content ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR f.resolution_note ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY f.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE feedbacks SET status = #{status}, resolved_at = #{resolvedAt}, resolved_by = #{resolvedBy}, resolution_note = #{resolutionNote}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE feedback_id = #{feedbackId}
